sentences.english: Do you prefer taking online classes or in-person classes?
sentences.korean: 온라인 수업과 대면 수업 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: Use specific reasons and examples to support your answer.
I strongly prefer in-person classes over online ones.
sentences.korean: 온라인 수업보다 대면 수업을 강하게 선호해요.

sentences.english: The main reason is that I focus much better in a classroom setting.
sentences.korean: 주된 이유는 교실 환경에서 훨씬 더 잘 집중하기 때문이에요.

sentences.english: At home there are too many distractions like my phone and TV.
sentences.korean: 집에서는 폰이나 TV 같은 방해 요소가 너무 많아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks
Social Media — More Harm or Good

sentences.english: Additionally I learn better through real-time interaction with the teacher.
sentences.korean: 또한 선생님과의 실시간 상호작용을 통해 더 잘 배워요.

sentences.english: When I don't understand something I can raise my hand and ask immediately.
sentences.korean: 이해가 안 되면 바로 손을 들고 질문할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: Finally being around classmates motivates me to work harder and stay on track.
sentences.korean: 마지막으로 급우들과 함께 있으면 더 열심히 하고 궤도에 머무르도록 동기 부여가 돼요.

sentences.english: That's why I believe in-person classes are more effective for learning.
sentences.korean: 그래서 대면 수업이 학습에 더 효과적이라고 생각해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You
